# services.tusd

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `services.tusd`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `services.tusd.basePath` | `string` | The basepath of the HTTP server. |
| `services.tusd.behindProxy` | `boolean` | Whether to respect X-Forwarded-\* and similar headers which may be set by proxies. |
| `services.tusd.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable tus resumable upload protocol server. |
| `services.tusd.extraArgs` | `list of string` | Additional arguments given to tusd. |
| `services.tusd.hooksEnabledEvents` | `list of string` | The list of enabled hook events. |
| `services.tusd.hooksHttp` | `null or string` | The HTTP endpoint to which hook events will be sent to. |
| `services.tusd.host` | `string` | The host to bind the HTTP server to. |
| `services.tusd.maxSize` | `null or signed integer` | The maximum size of a single upload in bytes. |
| `services.tusd.networkTimeout` | `null or string` | The timeout for reading the request and writing the response. If tusd does not receive data for this duration, it will consider the connection dead. |
| `services.tusd.openFirewall` | `boolean` | Whether to open the firewall port for tusd. |
| `services.tusd.port` | `16 bit unsigned integer; between 0 and 65535 (both inclusive)` | The port to bind the HTTP server to. |
| `services.tusd.uploadDir` | `absolute path` | The directory to store uploads in. |
